nasb.text: To the sons of Aaron they gave the following cities of refuge: Hebron, Libnah also with its pasture lands, Jattir, Eshtemoa with its pasture lands,

esv.text: To the sons of Aaron they gave the cities of refuge: Hebron, Libnah with its pasturelands, Jattir, Eshtemoa with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 以色列人把避難城希伯崙給了亞倫的子孫，還有立拿和屬於立拿的草場，雅提珥、以實提莫和屬於以實提莫的草場，

ccb.text: 亚伦的子孙得到避难城希伯仑、立拿及其周围的草场、雅提珥、以实提莫及其周围的草场、
